allow: PowerShell($r = $null; foreach \($i in 1..15\) { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; break } catch { Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 800 } }; if \($null -eq $r\) { "SERVER NOT UP" } else { "Status: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; $html = $r.Content; "H1 present: $\($html -match 'From Prarambh to launch'\)"; "JSON-LD: $\($html -match 'application/ld\\+json'\)"; "FAQPage schema: $\($html -match 'FAQPage'\)"; "Navbar: $\($html -match 'Get Started'\)"; "Pricing: $\($html -match 'Most popular'\)"; "Stages: $\($html -match 'Feasibility'\)"; "Footer: $\($html -match 'All rights reserved'\)"; "HTML bytes: $\($html.Length\)" })

PowerShell(Start-Job -ScriptBlock { Set-Location "c:\\Users\\MAINAK CHAUDHURI\\OneDrive\\Desktop\\Prarambh"; npm run start } | Out-Null; $r = $null; foreach \($i in 1..20\) { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; break } catch { Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 800 } }; if \($null -eq $r\) { "SERVER NOT UP" } else { $html = $r.Content; "Status: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; "Carousel: $\($html -match 'aria-roledescription=\\"carousel\\"'\)"; "Tablist: $\($html -match 'role=\\"tablist\\"'\)"; "Phase 1 of 5: $\($html -match 'Phase <!-- -->1'\)"; "Define screen: $\($html -match 'Initiation'\)"; "Gate summary: $\($html -match 'gates closed'\)" }; Get-Job | Stop-Job; Get-Job | Remove-Job -Force)
